message:
refactor: migrate direct tokio imports to fcp-async-core across connectors and crates

Replace all direct tokio references with their fcp-async-core facade
equivalents throughout the connector and crate tree, completing the
runtime abstraction layer introduced in the previous commit.

Connector migrations:
- llm-router: 38 `#[tokio::test]` -> `#[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]`
  in connector.rs, 42 in integration.rs
- twitter: 30 `#[tokio::test]` -> `#[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]`
  in lib.rs; reorder buffer drain for efficiency in stream.rs
- slack: `tokio::sync::oneshot` -> `fcp_async_core::channel::oneshot`
  in integration tests

Crate migrations:
- fcp-e2e: promote fcp-async-core from dev-deps to deps; replace
  `#[tokio::main]` with `#[fcp_async_core::runtime::main]` in binary;
  replace tokio::time::sleep, tokio::sync::Mutex, tokio::process,
  tokio::io, tokio::task across lib.rs, subprocess.rs, and 6 compliance
  test files
- fcp-testkit: replace tokio::sync::watch, tokio::spawn,
  tokio::time::sleep in supervisor_examples.rs
- fcp-core: remove `tokio` from dev-dependencies
- fcp-sdk: remove `tokio` from dev-dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
